children.name: 1. Test Case ID: 0QkVcc  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/ready` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/ready

1. Test Case ID: CE5qIQ  - Response timeout      The server failed to respond within the specified limit of 10000.00ms  Reproduce with:       curl -X POST -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}, "ref": {"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}}, "reply": {"ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}, "template": {"id": {"eq": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-816863cfa5ff"}, "ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}, "type": "7808d2ba-d511-40af-84e8-c0d1625fdfdc", "ver": {"max": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-000000000000", "min": "01944e87-e68c-7f22-9df1-ffffffffffff"}}' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/document/index?page=5&limit=10'

1. Test Case ID: z6Ct5u  - Response timeout      The server failed to respond within the specified limit of 10000.00ms  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/document/01943a32-9f35-7a14-b364-36ad693465e6?version=01943a32-9f35-7a14-b364-36ad693465e6'

1. Test Case ID: pXZAVB  - Undocumented HTTP status code      Received: 400     Documented: 503, 429, 500, 200, 422, 403, 401, 404  [400] Bad Request:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H '0: ' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/chain_root/0  2. Test Case ID: M16kIr  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse path `stake_address`: failed to parse \"string(cardano:cip19-address)\": invalid cardano:cip19-address","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/chain_root/0

1. Test Case ID: WItahD  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `GET /api/v1/health/started` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/started

1. Test Case ID: FMtvCM  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"authorization error","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' -H 'Content-Type: application/json; charset=utf-8' -d '{"sentry": {"dsn": "https://example.com", "environment": "dev", "release": "1.0.0"}}' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend?IP=192.168.10.15'

Test Case ID: w7ZQoN  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse parameter `role0_key`: verification failed. minLength(34)","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/rbac/role0_chain_root/0

Test Case ID: DZiXBB  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'string'      Schema at /properties/detail/items/properties/type:          {             "type": "string",             "format": "error",             "title": "Error Message",             "description": "The type of error",             "example": "An error has occurred, the details of the error are ...",             "maxLength": 1000,             "minLength": 1,             "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"         }      Value:          null  [422] Unprocessable Entity:      `{"detail":[{"loc":null,"msg":"failed to parse parameter `asat`: failed to parse \"string(slot or time)\": Not a valid `as_at` parameter. Invalid SLOT specified. (occurred while parsing \"optional_string(slot or time)\")","type":null}]}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' 'http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/cardano/registration/cip36?asat=SLOT%3A%D9%A0'

1. Test Case ID: fAMKI4  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `200 OK` for `GET /api/draft/config/frontend/schema` with invalid auth.  - Response violates schema      None is not of type 'object'      Schema at /properties/sentry/allOf/0:          {             "type": "object",             "description": "Frontend configuration for Sentry.",             "required": [                 "dsn"             ],             "properties": {                 "dsn": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "The Data Source Name (DSN) for Sentry.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^https?://"                 },                 "release": {                     "type": "string",                     "description": "A version of the code deployed to an environment.",                     "maxLength": 100,                     "pattern": "^[0-9a-zA-Z].*$"                 },             // Output truncated...         }      Value:          null  [200] OK:      `{"sentry":null}`  Reproduce with:       curl -X GET -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/draft/config/frontend/schema

1. Test Case ID: nNXHSD  - Authentication declared but not enforced for this operation      The API returned `204 No Content` for `PUT /api/v1/health/inspection` with invalid auth.  [204] No Content:  Reproduce with:       curl -X PUT -H 'Authorization: [Filtered]' http://0.0.0.0:3030/api/v1/health/inspection
